parsed.explanation: Fixed character encoding errors (e.g., 'Pa√üions' to 'Passions', 'Hau√ü' to 'Haus'), corrected typos in names (Stahiii to Stahlii, Nouvelie to Nouvelle), standardized tag names (changed PRIZE to PRICE for consistency), and removed non-standard symbols (√†).
